scenario.context: Station 07 of the day run: test functionality and expand unit tests.
scenario.mission: You choose testing methods, formulate test cases, and secure core functions with unit tests.

station.profile: Testing methods, test cases, unit tests

customerRequest.subject: Station 07: Expand testing
customerRequest.body: Please extend the test set for core functions and provide usable test evidence.

questions.title: Choose testing methods appropriately
questions.prompt: Which statements make sense for the test strategy? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Document the test goal for each component
options.rationale: Makes the purpose of the check transparent.

options.text: Only manual one-off tests without evidence
Plan positive and negative test cases

feedback.correct: Correct: Strategy and risk focus fit together.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please secure the test goal and reproducibility more strongly.

questions.title: Unit-test focus
questions.prompt: What should unit tests mainly target?

options.text: Clearly scoped functions with explicit expectations
options.rationale: That keeps tests stable and meaningful.
That is not the main focus of unit tests.
Not a core goal of unit tests.

feedback.correct: Correct: Unit tests should check clearly scoped logic.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Unit tests need a clear function focus.

questions.title: Test chain to finding
questions.prompt: Put the flow from test case to finding in order.
items: Derive the test case from the requirement
Define input data and the expected result
Run the test in an automated way
correctOrder: Derive the test case from the requirement
Define input data and the expected result
Run the test in an automated way

feedback.correct: Correct: The test chain is traceable.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please secure derivation and expectation before execution.

questions.title: Failure rate in the test run
questions.prompt: Out of 52 test cases, 7 fail. What is the failure rate in percent (rounded)?

feedback.wrong: Please calculate the share of failing tests correctly.

questions.title: Formulate test evidence
questions.prompt: Formulate test evidence in 4-6 sentences with goal, finding, and next action.
questions.expectedOutline: Clear test purpose, result reference, and follow-up action.

feedback.correct: Correct: The evidence is suitable for the team and acceptance.
feedback.wrong: Please structure goal, finding, and next action more clearly.
